_comment: NPC: Tu Si (涂司). Canon ID: N22. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Tu Si
personality: ancient god; left inheritance for Wang Lin

perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Tu Si; Ancient God 8-Star; left inheritance
perception_tiers.spirit_severing: Tu Si; Ancient God 8-Star; Wang Lin inherited his god-knowledge

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.
